description_long: This bread object has an irregular, roughly triangular shape with a thick, domed top and a tapered base. The surface is predominantly a muted tan color with prominent reddish-brown streaks and patches, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The crust appears dense and slightly rough, with some areas showing a matte finish and subtle textural variations. The underside is lighter in color, almost beige, and features a visible marking or code. The sides are relatively thin and show a clear transition between the crust and the inner crumb. There are no visible slices, and the bread appears whole and unsliced.
description: A rustic, triangular loaf of bread with a thick, tan crust and reddish-brown streaks, featuring a dense, unsliced form.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad, domed top with reddish-brown streaks and a thick, rustic crust.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile and the transition between the crust and the lighter interior.
description_view_2: The back view displays the lighter, beige underside with a visible marking or code.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the rough, uneven edge and the continuation of the reddish-brown streaks.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rough, rustic texture with irregular reddish-brown streaks and patches, lacking any visible scoring or flour dusting. The surface appears naturally formed, with no seeds or decorative markings.
